seoTitle: Lizard vs Llanarth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lizard and Llanarth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lizard and Llanarth.
heading: Lizard vs Llanarth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lizard, Queensland and Llanarth, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Llanarth has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Lizard (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lizard or Llanarth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lizard has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Llanarth scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lizard scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Llanarth scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lizard or Llanarth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Llanarth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
